01_initial_request.input_data: 5 benign nevi and 67 melanoma tissue samples (including 30 pre-ICI therapy)
01_initial_request.user_intent: understand mechanisms of response and resistance to immune checkpoint inhibitors (ICIs) through spatial characterization of the tumor microenvironment
01_initial_request.quantifiable_goal: spatially quantify 35 proteins at subcellular resolution and determine association of T cell enrichment and proximity with ICI response

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Melanoma tumor microenvironment characterization requires spatial profiling of multiple protein markers. [Gap] Need to establish tissue samples and construct tissue microarray for multiplexed analysis. [Decision] To achieve comprehensive microenvironment profiling, chose to use tissue microarray construction to prepare 5 benign nevi and 67 melanoma tissue samples (including 30 pre-ICI therapy) for simultaneous staining and acquisition.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: TMA constructed with representative areas of viable tumor mapped from FFPE tissue blocks

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Multiplexed protein detection requires validated antibody panel with metal isotope conjugates. [Gap] Need to develop and validate antibody panel for CyTOF IMC platform. [Decision] To achieve 35-protein spatial quantification, chose to use antibody panel development with metal isotope conjugates to characterize melanoma, lymphocyte subsets, macrophage/monocyte, and stromal cell populations.

parameters.marker_types: lineage markers (CD45, CD3, CD4, CD8, CD20, CD68), immune checkpoints (CD40, ICOS, LAG3, TIM3, PD-L1, VISTA), melanoma markers (SOX10, S100), stromal markers (CD31), signaling markers (β-catenin, ERK, MEK), proliferation marker (Ki67)

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Antibody panel validated in spleen and melanoma tissue to confirm affinity and specificity of binding

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Antibody validation is critical before IMC data acquisition. [Gap] Need to confirm antibody performance on tissue samples. [Decision] To ensure reliable staining, chose to use immunofluorescence validation on tonsil and melanoma tissues to confirm adequate staining intensity, optimal signal-to-noise ratio, and expected staining patterns.

parameters.secondary_antibodies: Alexa Fluor 488 donkey anti-rabbit or Alexa Fluor 594 donkey anti-mouse (1:500)

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Antibody clones with optimal signal-to-noise ratio selected; antibodies with high background noise, nonspecific staining, or weak signal discarded

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Validated antibodies need to be applied to tissue samples for spatial protein quantification. [Gap] Need to acquire IMC images from TMA slides. [Decision] To obtain spatial protein expression data, chose to use Hyperion Imaging System coupled to Helios mass cytometer to acquire IMC images at subcellular resolution.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: IMC data acquired as MCD files and txt files; poor-quality TMA cores excluded

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Raw IMC images need to be converted to single-cell data for analysis. [Gap] Need to segment cells and identify nuclei from IMC images. [Decision] To convert images to single-cell data, chose to use CellProfiler with ilastik supervised learning to perform nuclear segmentation using histone H3 and iridium channels.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Cell segmentation completed with nuclei identified as primary objects; cellular segmentation allows background staining not associated with nucleus to be ignored

references.relevance: Adapted cell segmentation method from this reference

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Segmented cells need to be classified into cell lineages. [Gap] Need to identify cell types based on marker expression patterns. [Decision] To classify cells into lineages, chose to use PhenoGraph clustering algorithm on intensities of 10 lineage markers to initially classify cells into six lineages.

parameters.lineage_markers: CD45, CD3, CD4, CD8, CD20, CD68, CD14, SOX10, S100, CD31
parameters.seed_clusters: 8 for ICI cohort, 10 for non-ICI cohort

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Cells classified into six lineages: CD8+ cytotoxic T cells, CD4+ T helper cells, macrophage/monocytes, B cells, melanoma/melanocytes, and endothelial cells

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Initial clustering needs refinement for accurate cell type identification. [Gap] Need to improve cell classification accuracy. [Decision] To refine cell classification, chose to use k-means algorithm with mean intensities of identified clusters as initial cluster centers to reassign cells.

parameters.reassignment_criteria: cells nearly equidistant to two or more clusters reclassified as others

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Cell classification refined with ambiguous expression profiles reclassified to others group

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Immune cell subsets need further subclassification for functional analysis. [Gap] Need to identify Tregs and discriminate naive vs antigen-experienced T cells. [Decision] To subclassify immune cells, chose to use ilastik supervised learning algorithm to determine positivity for FoxP3 and CD45RO markers.

parameters.markers: FoxP3, CD45RO, Ki67, and all checkpoints
parameters.classification_method: random forest trained on manual annotations

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Tregs identified (CD4+FoxP3+); naive (CD45RO-) and antigen-experienced (CD45RO+) cytotoxic and helper T cells discriminated

references.relevance: ilastik interactive machine learning for image analysis

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Cell type distributions need visualization and quality assessment. [Gap] Need to visualize cell clustering patterns and assess classification quality. [Decision] To visualize and assess cell classification quality, chose to use UMAP algorithm to project all identified cells on a two-dimensional plane.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Distinct clustering patterns observed recapitulating identified cell types; more than 220,000 individual cells profiled from 72 samples

references.relevance: UMAP dimensionality reduction for single-cell data

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Spatial relationships between cell types need to be quantified. [Gap] Need to construct spatial graph to analyze cell-cell interactions. [Decision] To quantify cell-cell interactions, chose to use Delaunay triangulation with 30μm distance threshold to construct spatial graph where nodes correspond to cells and edges represent inferred contacts.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Spatial graph constructed; most cells had five or six immediate neighbors; physical distances varied by cell type pairs

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Contact enrichment between cell types needs statistical assessment. [Gap] Need to estimate contact enrichment/depletion while accounting for cell type proportions. [Decision] To estimate contact enrichment, chose to use permutation approach with 1000 permutations of cell labels to generate null distributions for expected number of contacts.

parameters.output: z score representing degree of significance

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Contact enrichment scores computed; melanoma cells enriched in contacts with macrophage/monocyte and unclassified groups, depleted in contacts with endothelial cells

references.relevance: Cell shuffling algorithm for contact enrichment
histoCAT analysis of cell phenotypes and interactions

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Spatial mixing patterns need quantification independent of cell proportions. [Gap] Need to measure tendency for cells of same type to cluster together. [Decision] To quantify spatial clustering tendency, chose to use assortativity coefficient from graph theory to measure mixing between cell types.

parameters.interpretation: 1 = perfect assortative mixing, 0 = random mixing, negative = disassortative mixing

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Assortativity coefficients calculated for each cell type; most abundant cell types showed highest levels of colocalization

references.relevance: Mixing patterns in networks assortativity coefficient

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Correlation between T cell proximity and ICI response needs statistical testing. [Gap] Need to compare spatial metrics between responders and nonresponders. [Decision] To identify correlates of ICI response, chose to use Wilcoxon rank sum test to compare median distance from melanoma cells to nearest antigen-experienced T cells between responders and nonresponders.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Antigen-experienced T cells located significantly closer to melanoma cells in responders vs nonresponders (P=0.025)

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Proliferating T cell abundance may correlate with ICI response. [Gap] Need to test association between Ki67+ antigen-experienced T cells and treatment response. [Decision] To identify proliferation correlates, chose to use Wilcoxon rank sum test to compare proportion of Ki67+ antigen-experienced cytotoxic T cells between responders and nonresponders.

parameters.marker: Ki67 on antigen-experienced cytotoxic T cells (Tc.ae)

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Presence of Ki67 on antigen-experienced cytotoxic T cells showed significant association with improved ICI response (P=0.022)

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Survival outcomes need to be analyzed based on T cell characteristics. [Gap] Need to assess whether T cell markers predict patient survival. [Decision] To assess survival correlation, chose to use Kaplan-Meier survival analysis with Mantel-Haenszel log-rank test to compare survival between high and low Ki67+ Tc.ae proportion groups.

parameters.stratification: median proportion of Ki67+ Tc.ae cells

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Patients with high proportion of Ki67+ antigen-experienced T cells had improved survival (P=0.0019)

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] IMC findings need validation on whole tissue slides. [Gap] Need to verify that TMA cores are representative of larger tumor areas. [Decision] To validate IMC findings, chose to use multiplex immunofluorescence microscopy on whole slides from same samples to compare cell type proportions.

parameters.kit: Akoya Biosciences Opal 7-color Manual IHC Kit
parameters.area_comparison: whole tumor slide represented approximately four times the area used in CyTOF analysis

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Significant correlation in cell type proportions when comparing subsampled regions from whole tumor slides; smaller cores generally representative of larger tumor areas

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Findings need validation in independent patient cohort. [Gap] Need to confirm Ki67+ Tc.ae survival trend in separate cohort. [Decision] To validate survival findings, chose to use multiplex immunofluorescence on independent validation cohort of 25 melanoma patients treated with ICIs.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Trend toward longer survival in patients with higher proportions of Ki67+ Tc.ae held in validation cohort

03_success_verification.validation_technique: Multiplex immunofluorescence microscopy on whole slides and independent validation cohort

t_cell_proximity_significance.interpretation: Antigen-experienced T cells significantly closer to melanoma cells in ICI responders vs nonresponders

ki67_tcell_response_association.interpretation: Ki67+ antigen-experienced cytotoxic T cells significantly associated with improved ICI response

survival_improvement.interpretation: High proportion of Ki67+ antigen-experienced T cells associated with improved overall survival

cells_profiled.interpretation: More than 220,000 individual cells profiled from 72 samples

protein_markers.interpretation: 35 proteins spatially quantified at subcellular resolution

samples_analyzed.interpretation: 5 benign nevi and 67 melanoma tissue samples including 30 pre-ICI therapy

03_success_verification.final_verdict: Research objective achieved: Successfully spatially quantified 35 proteins at subcellular resolution in melanoma tumor microenvironment and determined that T cell enrichment (proliferating antigen-experienced cytotoxic T cells CD8+CD45RO+Ki67+) and proximity to melanoma cells are significantly associated with ICI response. Findings validated through multiplex immunofluorescence on whole slides and independent cohort.
